metadata.instruction: Open video Task ID 75.mp4 in Documents > Task 75 folder on Media Player. Play the video in 1.5x speed.
metadata.context: I'm watching a video on Media Player, but I'm on a time crunch so I want to speed through it.

l3.rationale: Win key opens the system/start window so the user can launch Run.

l4.rationale: Win+R opens the Run dialog so the user can launch the next window.

l5.rationale: Initial application/window navigation and text/path handling to reach the Documents/Task 75 location before confirming it.
